summary: This role is a poor fit because it demands the exact analytical reasoning, real-time hypothesis testing, and quantitative skills you find challenging, rather than the protocol-driven work you prefer. Furthermore, the profession presents a severe risk to your long-term wellbeing, with 90% of practitioners experiencing chronic pain and musculoskeletal disorders. The high-stakes liability and frequent on-call requirements also conflict with your desire for a sustainable career and predictable schedule.
